agent_brief.title: Agent brief
points: 过去一年股价收益 +57.21%，相对 沪深300 的超额为 +54.22pct。
最大回撤发生在 20251008，说明年度收益并非线性修复。
当前 PE TTM 位于一年样本第 82 分位，估值处于样本中上区间。
assumptions: 示例 benchmark 和事件为生成器演示数据，真实报告必须来自数据源或用户输入。
技术状态只描述派生指标，不构成买入、卖出或持有建议。

notes: Example values are illustrative and exist only to demonstrate the annual performance report contract.
Benchmark and event rows in this example are generated placeholders. Production reports must disclose the real benchmark and event source.
A-share color convention: red means up, green means down.
Chart engine: lightweight-charts 5.2.0, vendored in the skill package under Apache-2.0 with TradingView attribution.
source_disclosure.risk_note: This visualization is not investment advice.
